name: RL Post-Training Builds Compositional Reasoning Strategies

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库
four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: Does RL post-training merely amplify primitive skills already latent in a base model, or can it compose primitive skills into new higher-level strategies? RL solves held-out problems rarely solved by the pretrained model even under much larger sampling budgets. Trace analysis shows that RL reorganizes primitive competence through a phased compositional mechanism: first strengthens primitive reductions, then discovers valid composed procedures including sequential and parallel compositions.
